title: Knowledge capture is zero-exception — every teaching surface says so, docs lane included
action: Per capture-invariant D1. Tighten the capture obligation to zero-exception in the surfaces that teach it, surgical rewording only: (1) skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md critical rule 9 ('Lanes scale ceremony, never memory') + root AGENTS.md rule 9 kept byte-parallel — add: the rule covers EVERY flow shape including the docs lane and non-cell quick work; a task close carries either a decisions-log/capture-stub line or an explicit 'nothing settled' statement — a close with neither is not a close. (2) skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md: the docs-lane routing row and the 'Docs lane' paragraph — the format-check step gains the same obligation ('write it, format-check it, and log the decision/capture stub — or state nothing settled'); also hive Priority Rule 9 same tightening. (3) skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md: in its self-trigger section, add the close-audit habit — at every task close, ask 'what settled here?' and either capture it or say nothing settled; smallness of the task is never the answer. Keep each file's voice; no restructuring. Then re-render mirrors (onboard_bee --apply + render_plugin_skill_trees) and regenerate the release manifest; impact_registry --check (prose-only, expect clean).

truths: AGENTS twins byte-parallel, rule 9 zero-exception incl. docs lane + 'nothing settled' escape
bee-hive docs-lane row/paragraph + priority rule 9 carry the obligation
bee-scribing self-trigger gains the close-audit habit

verify: node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: capture obligation now zero-exception in AGENTS rule 9 (twins), bee-hive docs-lane row/paragraph + priority rule 9, bee-scribing close-audit habit; mirrors+manifest regenerated
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
